mnemonics: RATS: Read, Apply, Test, Share - the process for using the suggested resources.
keyPoints: The resources are curated to build foundational knowledge before advancing.
Practical application exercises are included to solidify understanding.
The resources are a starting point; deeper dives may require independent research.
commonMistakes: Assuming the provided list is exhaustive and not seeking additional materials.
Skipping the foundational articles and jumping straight into the advanced technical papers.
Passively reading instead of actively applying the concepts through the provided exercises.
